case_title: RACHEL UPHAMIA CHURCH VS. LATONIA HAROLD

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHURCH, RACHEL UPHAMIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAROLD, LATONIA DBA  JAZZ'S HAIR SALON PLAINTIFF RACHEL UPHAMIA CHURCH HAS NOT MET HER BURDEN TO ESTABLISH BREACH OF CONTRACT, BREACH OF EXPRESS WARRANTY OR BREACH OF IMPLIED WARRANTY ON THE PART OF DEFENDANT LATONIA HAROLD OR STAFF MEMBER BRIANNA DOMIQUE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT HER ASSERTED DAMAGES WERE CAUSED BY DEFENDANT OR DEFENDANT'S AGENTS. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MITIGATE ANY ASSERTED DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY CHURCH, RACHEL UPHAMIA AS TO DEFENDANT HAROLD, LATONIA DBA  JAZZ'S HAIR SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED APR-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAROLD, LATONIA DBA  JAZZ'S HAIR SALON
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2018 BY JPT;ANDREA MGCARY; BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT; NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHURCH, RACHEL UPHAMIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
